CA_Mainland_arcsine.description: Arcsine-transformed percentage of forest lost per year for mainland countries in Central America. These are the same samples as CA_Mainland but measured/transformed differently; they share samples with CA_Island via the Central America region grouping and with SEA_Mainland via the Mainland location grouping.

CA_Island_arcsine.description: Arcsine-transformed percentage of forest lost per year for island countries in Central America. Shares region grouping (Central America) with CA_Mainland_arcsine and location grouping (Island) with SEA_Island_arcsine.

SEA_Mainland_arcsine.description: Arcsine-transformed percentage of forest lost per year for mainland countries in South East Asia. Shares region grouping (South East Asia) with SEA_Island_arcsine and location grouping (Mainland) with CA_Mainland_arcsine.

SEA_Island_arcsine.description: Arcsine-transformed percentage of forest lost per year for island countries in South East Asia. Shares region grouping (South East Asia) with SEA_Mainland_arcsine and location grouping (Island) with CA_Island_arcsine.

Region.description: Region factor with two levels: Central America and South East Asia. Used as a factor in the two-way ANOVA and subsequent multiple comparisons.

Location.description: Location factor with two levels: Mainland and Island. Used as a factor in the two-way ANOVA and subsequent multiple comparisons.
